subject: Changes for MDONS usecase
commit_message:
Changes for MDONS usecase

Template handling and SDNC request sending for Optical services.

Change-Id: I52838076ea119237758dfdc804f2ee1f55f3c33c
Issue-ID: SO-2460
Signed-off-by: Srinivasan Ramanathan <srinivasan.ramanathan2@us.fujitsu.com>

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 2 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

CHanges for MDONS usecase along with fixes for comments from Subhash on:
https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/so/+/103368

Patch Set 1:

Build Started https://jenkins.onap.org/job/so-master-verify-java/3910/
Uploaded patch set 2.
